action.reasoning: Observation: 3 epochs with codec aug → test EER 0.0956 (improved from 0.1066). Codec augmentation helps. Analysis: Need stronger augmentation closer to ASVspoof21 codecs. Real test has G.722, GSM, OPUS — these involve actual lossy codecs not just bandlimit. Also longer training + more aggressive randomization could help. With ~7.8h left and ~150s/epoch, I can afford much longer training. Decision: Strengthen augmentation (RawBoost-style: linear/non-linear convolution noise, impulsive noise, more codec types), use longer audio (5s), train 6 epochs, keep XLS-R-300M.
